executives.name: Deborah Kerr
executives.background: Deborah L. Kerr has been a member of our Board since November 2017. She was previously the Executive Vice President and Chief Product and Technology Officer of Sabre Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Boskin
executives.background: Tully M. Friedman Professor of Economics and Senior Fellow, Hoover Institution, Stanford University.

executives.name: Renée James
executives.background: Founder, Chairman and CEO of Ampere Computing and former President of Intel Corporation.
